Title: Couple Portrait From Two Separate Selfies (Both Faces Locked)
Teaser: Merges two solo selfies into one believable couple portrait — natural closeness, matched light, shared depth of field — so it reads as a single photo taken together, with both faces unmistakably preserved.
PromptHint: Attach BOTH selfies (yours first, partner second), then set the [SCENE/SETTING], the [MOOD], and optionally the [WARDROBE STYLE].
Prompt: ROLE: You are a couples and engagement photographer who composites two separately-shot people into one seamless frame, working inside GPT-4o / Gemini's native image editor. TASK: Using the two attached selfies [SELFIE-A] and [SELFIE-B] as the single source of identity for each person, build one natural COUPLE PORTRAIT of these exact two people standing close together. Setting: [SCENE/SETTING]. Mood: [MOOD]. Wardrobe style: [WARDROBE STYLE]. THINK FIRST (silently, do not print): how two people actually stand as a couple (overlapping shoulders, one slightly behind, heads tilted toward each other), then unify the lighting direction, color temperature, white balance and depth of field so neither face looks pasted in. THEN GENERATE: an 50mm f/2.2 look, waist-up crop, a single soft key with consistent fill across both faces, true catchlights in all four eyes, relaxed genuine connection between them, the named setting softly defocused behind. CONSTRAINTS: keep BOTH faces, skin tones, hairlines, eye colors and ages unmistakably recognizable — do NOT beautify or merge them into a blended stranger; match scale so heights look believable; preserve real pores and texture; BAN cutout halos, mismatched light on the two faces, plastic skin, extra fingers, three legs, identity drift on either person. OUTPUT FORMAT: print exactly two labeled blocks and nothing else. 1) GPT-4o / GEMINI PROMPT: one conversational paragraph ready to paste, ending with the literal line 'keep both faces and identities exactly, match the lighting on both people, photo-realistic not illustrated'. 2) MIDJOURNEY V7: one line ordered Subjects > Pose > Setting > Lighting > Lens, ending exactly with --ar 4:5 --style raw --s 110 --hd.

PromptHint: Attach your couple photo, name the [THEME/ERA], then set the [SETTING] and optionally the [PALETTE/MOOD].

TASK: Using the attached couple photo [COUPLE-PHOTO] as the single source of identity for both people, restyle the same two people into a themed ANNIVERSARY shoot as if photographed for [THEME/ERA]. Setting: [SETTING]. Palette/mood: [PALETTE/MOOD]. THINK FIRST (silently, do not print): list only the cues that actually signal this theme — the hair, eyewear, fabric and cut of the wardrobe, the set dressing, and the camera/film character — then change those and nothing about who they are. THEN GENERATE: a flattering portrait look, waist-up or three-quarter crop, restyle both into theme-accurate wardrobe and hair, place them in the named setting, and grade the whole frame to the theme's photography (film stock, color cast, grain, lens). OUTPUT FORMAT: print exactly two labeled blocks and nothing else. 1) GPT-4o / GEMINI PROMPT: one conversational paragraph ready to paste, ending with the literal line 'keep both faces and identities exactly, photo-realistic not illustrated'. 2) MIDJOURNEY V7: one line ordered Subjects > Wardrobe > Setting > Grade > Lens, ending exactly with --ar 3:2 --style raw --s 130 --hd.
